name: mailagent
description: Temporary inboxes for Codex OTP, magic links, and signup QA flows.

interface.shortDescription: Temporary inboxes for OTP and magic link QA.
interface.longDescription: Create disposable inboxes, wait for signup messages, extract OTPs or magic links, and clean up test inboxes from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Verify a signup flow with a temporary inbox.
Create an inbox and wait for an OTP email.
Extract a magic link from a signup email.
Simulate a test OTP email when staging mail is unavailable.
